Tiny step, brave heart. Gwyn is with you.
Pause. Breathe. You are safer than the worry says.
One gentle breath can change the next minute.
You do not have to solve today all at once.
Soften your shoulders. Come back to now.
Your courage counts, even when it is quiet.
Take the kindest next step. That is enough.
You have survived hard moments before.
Let the thought pass like weather.
Hand on heart. You are doing your best.
Small calm choices still move mountains.
Gwyn says: begin again, softly.
This moment can be simple. Inhale, exhale.
You are allowed to take up space today.
Choose one thing you can control, then breathe.
You are not behind. You are healing.
Let your nervous system hear: I am here.
Be tender with yourself for one full breath.
Today needs presence, not perfection.
Your peace is worth returning to.
